name: Jarllytec Co. , Ltd.
summary: Jarllytec Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells various hinges in Taiwan, China, the United States, Thailand, and internationally. It offers hinges for NB, LCD, LCD TVs, cell phones, PDAs, office equipment, in-car handheld type products, 3C products, medical equipment, fiber optic connectors, fiber optic patchcords, RF connectors, fiber optic splitters, fiber optic attenuators, fiber optic terminators, and couplers/WDMs, as well as metal injection/MIM. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
